workflow.name: Document Artifact Audit Supervisor Graph
workflow.description: FreshForge-compatible graph for a local Copilot supervisor that materializes, audits, repairs, and reports document-indexing artifact gates under Agent Workbench authority boundaries.

nodes.name: Prepare supervisor job ticket
nodes.description: Coordinator selects source artifacts, project root, allowed tools, and final signal vocabulary.

agent_workbench.execution_boundary: Paid coordinator or future free coordinator owns task framing and acceptance gates.
agent_workbench.token_accounting: coordinator span required when paid model performs this node
nondelegable_actions: claim final benchmark conclusion without evidence

provenance.implementation: Codex coordinator or future free coordinator agent

nodes.name: Materialize runtime audit job
nodes.description: Supervisor runs the materializer with explicit project root to create the runtime contract and audit ticket.

agent_workbench.execution_boundary: Local supervisor may run the exact materializer command only.
agent_workbench.wrong_root_rule: Stop or fail validation if output is written outside assigned project root.
agent_workbench.token_accounting: coordinator launch span plus zero-cash local supervisor execution

provenance.implementation: Copilot custom supervisor using local tool command

nodes.name: Audit source artifact gates
nodes.description: Supervisor invokes a read-only auditor subagent to classify source summary gates with a fixed decision vocabulary.

agent_workbench.execution_boundary: Subagent receives only extracted source facts and returns compact advisory audit findings. Worker output is not authoritative until the supervisor and deterministic validators accept or repair it.
agent_workbench.known_quality_risk: P57 split_02 v4-v8 showed repeated subagent decision defects; supervisor repair and deterministic verification are required before coordinator acceptance.
agent_workbench.token_accounting: local Copilot/Ollama tokens at zero cash cost

nodes.name: Write supervisor report
nodes.description: Supervisor writes the runtime JSON report using source facts, subagent payload, and decision consistency checks.

agent_workbench.execution_boundary: Supervisor may write only the assigned runtime report path.
agent_workbench.subagent_outcome_policy: Supervisor must record whether the subagent result was accepted, repaired, replaced, or unavailable.
agent_workbench.token_accounting: zero-cash local supervisor tokens plus paid coordinator validation span

nodes.name: Validate and repair report
nodes.description: Coordinator validates the supervisor report; if it fails a bounded validator rule, a repair ticket may be delegated back to the supervisor.

outputs.repair_evidence: repair bridge report when repair was required

agent_workbench.execution_boundary: Deterministic validator owns pass/fail; supervisor may repair only bounded report defects.
agent_workbench.repair_stop_rule: Escalate after one failed bounded repair in this graph version.
agent_workbench.validator_policy: Deterministic validators own pass/fail for source facts, gate decisions, score consistency, graph-report coherence, and allowed mutation surfaces.
agent_workbench.token_accounting: separate coordinator spans for validation and repair launch

provenance.implementation: Agent Workbench authority validator plus bounded Copilot repair ticket

nodes.name: Prepare coordinator review packet
nodes.description: Coordinator records a sanitized summary, token spans, and open questions for developer review.

agent_workbench.execution_boundary: Tracked summary may contain sanitized evidence only; no raw transcripts, provider details, or personal paths.
agent_workbench.token_accounting: paid coordinator summary span unless delegated to free coordinator

provenance.implementation: Codex coordinator or future free coordinator agent
